description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest print, ribbing around the inner neck, and nike swoosh on the left sleeveFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron on the print Do not dry clean cricket is arguably a religion of Indians. This t-shirt is a further reinforcement of the belief. The bright chest print symbolising India's love for cricket adds colour to the T-shirt, while the soft cotton keeps you cool and fresh all day. Pair it with jeans and slippers for that perfect casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
